properties.entry: PROVENANCE WITH SEMIRING COMBINER N OF (SELECT * FROM R_n HAS PROVENANCE (mul));
PROVENANCE WITH SEMIRING COMBINER N OF (SELECT a FROM R_n HAS PROVENANCE (mul));
PROVENANCE WITH SEMIRING COMBINER N OF (SELECT a FROM R_n HAS PROVENANCE (mul), (SELECT 1 FROM S_n HAS PROVENANCE (mul)) sub);
PROVENANCE WITH SEMIRING COMBINER N OF (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 1 FROM R_n HAS PROVENANCE (mul)) r, (SELECT 1 FROM S_n HAS PROVENANCE (mul)) s);
